subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord! I beseech Thee to grant pardon and forgiveness unto Thy servant, who hath passed his days in remembrance of Thy days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی اسئلک العفو و الصفح عن عبدک الذی قضی ایامه متذکرا بایامک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
